response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's career is built almost entirely on web and full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. His C++ exposure is limited to a single six-month role writing components for NI LabWindows/CVI and a bachelor's thesis project — neither of which demonstrates the depth in STL, multi-threading, or concurrent systems the role demands. He has no background in industrial automation, no familiarity with industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, DNP 3.0, MQTT) or cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1), and no demonstrated management or mentoring track record for a Senior Manager position.
strengths: Event-driven and distributed systems experience at Sociomantic, handling millions of HTTP requests per second, shows scalability thinking
Node.js and React exposure partially satisfies the listed advantageous skills
Broad career spanning embedded, mobile, desktop, and web contexts indicates adaptability
concerns: C++ is effectively absent from the candidate's primary skill set; the language appears in only one short-tenure role and a thesis project over a 14-year career
No industrial automation, OT/ICS domain knowledge, or industrial protocol experience (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, MQTT) whatsoever
Senior Manager role requires SDL and IEC 62443 compliance expertise plus mentoring leadership — neither is evidenced in the resume
